New Perplexity computer update now in your pocket. Perplexity just dropped something wild. They put an entire AI computer inside your phone. Not a chatbot, not an app, a full AI worker. And today, I'm going to show you exactly how it works. This one is big. Like really big. Let's get into it. So, here's the deal. You know how most AI tools work, right? You type something in, you get an answer back. Cool. That's it. That's all they do. They talk. they don't actually do anything for you. Perplexity computer is completely different. This thing doesn't just answer your questions. It actually goes out and does the work. Like imagine you said, "Hey, go research the top 10 AI tools for video editing and put it all in a nice report for me." A normal chatbot would just give you a list, maybe some links done. Perplexity Computer actually goes and does the research. It reads the articles. It compares the tools. It builds the report. It hands you the finished thing. You didn't do anything. The AI did the whole job. Think of it like hiring a really smart assistant. Except this assistant never sleeps, never takes a break, never complains, and works on your stuff around the clock. Now, here's how it actually works under the hood. And this is the cool part. It doesn't just use one AI model. It uses like 19 or more different AI models at the same time. So, when you give it a task, it breaks that task into little pieces. Then, it picks the best AI model for each piece. So let's say you ask it to build a marketing plan. One model handles the research, another one handles the writing, another one handles the strategy. They all work together like a team, and you just sit back and wait for the finished result. It's like having a whole team of AI workers instead of just one. That's why it can handle stuff that no single AI chatbot can do on its own. Now, let me show you what kinds of things this can actually do because the range is nuts. Research. You can tell it to do deep research on any topic. market analysis, competitor breakdowns, full summaries with sources, all done for you. Content creation, blog posts, scripts, full documents. You just tell it what you need and it builds the whole thing. Automation, it can monitor websites, gather data from all over the place, create dashboards, set up workflows that run on their own, and it can even build software like actual apps. It can generate code, put projects together. This is not a toy. This is a real tool that does real work. Okay, so now let's talk about why I'm making this video today. Because Plexity just dropped the update that changes everything. Perplexity computer is now on your phone. Let me say that again. You can now run your AI computer from your pocket, from your actual phone. Before this update, Perplexity computer was stuck on your desktop. You had to be at your laptop. You had to be sitting at your desk. If you left, the AI was still working, but you couldn't see what it was doing. You couldn't control it. You were blind. Now, with this new mobile update, your phone becomes the remote control for your AI worker. You can start a task on your laptop, walk out the door, pull out your phone, and boom, you can see exactly what the AI is doing. You can check the progress. You can give it new instructions. You can download the results right there on your phone. Everything syncs across your devices, desktop to phone, phone to desktop. It doesn't matter where you are. Your AI computer goes with you. Right now, this is available on iOS in the Perplexity app. Android is coming soon. Now, let me paint you a picture of what this actually looks like in real life because I think once you see this, you're going to understand why this is so huge. Let's say you're at your desk in the morning. You open up computer and you type in research the best AI tools for YouTube automation and create a full report. Right? The AI starts working. It's planning out the tasks. It's breaking everything down. It's assigning different AI models to different parts of the job. Now, you got to leave. You got to go to a meeting. You got to pick up your kids. Whatever. Before this update, you just have to hope everything went fine while you were gone. But now, you pull out your phone, open the Perplexity app, and right there, you can see the AI is halfway done with the research. It's already found eight tools. It's writing up the comparisons. You can see everything happening in real time. And here's the best part. You can actually jump in and change things on the fly. You can say, "Hey, actually focus more on free tools." And the AI adjusts right there from your phone while you're standing in line at a coffee shop. That is insane. That is a real AI computer in your pocket. You just review it on your phone, and it's done. Use case number three, marketing. You tell it, "Create a full marketing plan for my new product." The AI builds out the strategy, the campaign ideas, the email sequences, the ad angles, everything delivered to you as a finished document. And you can monitor the whole thing from your phone while you're out living your life. See the pattern here? You give it a goal, not a question, a goal. and the AI figures out how to get there. That's the difference between this and every other AI tool out there. Most AI tools work like this. You give a prompt, you get a response, done. One and done. Plexity computer works like this. You give a prompt, the AI plans, the AI executes. The AI delivers a finished result. That's a completely different thing. That's not a chatbot. That's a worker. And now that worker lives in your pocket. Now, let's talk about where this is all heading because I think this is important to understand. Perplexity's whole vision is that AI becomes the computer itself. Right now, we use computers as tools. We click things. We open apps. We type stuff. We do the work manually. Their vision is that you don't do any of that anymore. You just tell the AI what you want done. And the AI handles everything. The research, the creation, the execution, all of it. Your job becomes the person with the ideas. The AI becomes the person who does the work. And now with this mobile update, you can manage that AI from anywhere in the world.
